moves.name: Iron Tail
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%の確率で防御を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で相手の防御ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Jet Punch
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 先制攻撃を行う。
moves.descJa: 優先度+1の先制技。

moves.name: King's Shield
moves.shortDesc: Protects from damaging attacks. Contact: -1 Atk.
moves.desc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon trying to make contact with the user have their Attack lowered by 1 stage. Non-damaging moves go through this protection. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 守りを固める。接触時は攻撃1段階低下。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃を防ぐ。接触した相手の攻撃ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.shortDesc: 1.5x damage if foe holds an item. Removes item.
moves.desc: If the target is holding an item that can be removed from it, ignoring the Sticky Hold Ability, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. If the user has not fainted, the target loses its held item. This move cannot cause Pokemon with the Sticky Hold Ability to lose their held item or cause a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, a Silvally, a Zacian, or a Zamazenta to lose their Blue Orb, Red Orb, Griseous Orb, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, or Rusted Shield respectively. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: 持ち物があれば威力1.5倍、叩き落とす。
moves.descJa: 持ち物がある相手に威力1.5倍。攻撃後、相手の持ち物を落とさせる。

moves.name: Kowtow Cleave
moves.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: 必中。
moves.descJa: 必ず命中する。

moves.name: Lash Out
moves.shortDesc: 2x power if the user had a stat lowered this turn.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user had a stat stage lowered this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 能力が下がっていれば威力2倍。
moves.descJa: このターンに自分の能力ランクが下がっていると威力が2倍になる。

moves.name: Last Resort
moves.shortDesc: Fails unless each known move has been used.
moves.desc: This move fails unless the user knows this move and at least one other move, and has used all the other moves it knows at least once each since it became active or Transformed.
moves.shortDescJa: 他全ての技を使わないと失敗する。
moves.descJa: 覚えている他の技をすべて一度ずつ使った後にのみ成功する。

moves.name: Last Respects
moves.shortDesc: +50 power for each time a party member fainted.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 50+(X*50), where X is the total number of times any Pokemon has fainted on the user's side, and X cannot be greater than 100.
moves.shortDescJa: 控えの瀕死ポケモン×50威力が上がる。
moves.descJa: 控えの瀕死の味方の数×50、威力が加算される。

moves.name: Lava Plume
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to burn adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%の確率で火傷にする。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で相手を「やけど」状態にする。

moves.name: Leaf Blade
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
moves.descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

moves.name: Leaf Storm
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の特攻を2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の特攻ランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Leech Life
moves.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: 与えたダメージの50%を回復。
moves.descJa: 与えたダメージの1/2のHPを回復する。

moves.name: Leech Seed
moves.shortDesc: 1/8 of target's HP is restored to user every turn.
moves.desc: The Pokemon at the user's position steals 1/8 of the target's maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn. If Big Root is held by the recipient, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will continue being leeched. If the target switches out or uses Mortal Spin or Rapid Spin successfully, the effect ends. Grass-type Pokemon are immune to this move on use, but not its effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 毎ターン相手の最大HP1/8を吸収。
moves.descJa: 毎ターン終了時、相手の最大HPの1/8を吸収して回復する。

moves.name: Life Dew
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user and its allies by 1/4 their max HP.
moves.desc: Each Pokemon on the user's side restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分と味方のHPを1/4回復。
moves.descJa: 自分と味方全員の最大HPの1/4を回復させる。

moves.name: Light of Ruin
moves.shortDesc: Has 1/2 recoil.
moves.desc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: 与えたダメージの1/2の反動。
moves.descJa: 与えたダメージの1/2の反動ダメージを受ける。

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, special damage to allies is halved.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from special attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle. Damage is not reduced further with Aurora Veil. Critical hits ignore this effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、特殊ダメージ半減。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、味方が受ける特殊攻撃のダメージを半減する（光の粘土で8ターン）。

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 20%で相手の防御を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 20%の確率で相手の防御ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Lock-On
moves.shortDesc: User's next move will not miss the target.
moves.desc: Until the end of the next turn, the target cannot avoid the user's moves, even if the target is in the middle of a two-turn move. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field. Fails if this effect is active for the user.
moves.shortDescJa: 次の自分の技が必中になる。
moves.descJa: 次のターンの終わりまで、相手は自分の技を回避できなくなる。

moves.name: Low Kick
moves.shortDesc: More power the heavier the target.
moves.desc: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手が重いほど威力が上がる。
moves.descJa: 相手の体重が重いほど威力が上がる（威力20〜120）。

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Lumina Crash
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の特防を2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の特防ランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Lunge
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の攻撃を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の攻撃ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Mach Punch
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 先制攻撃を行う。
moves.descJa: 優先度+1の先制技。

moves.name: Magic Powder
moves.shortDesc: Changes the target's type to Psychic.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become a Psychic type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Psychic type, or if the target is Terastallized.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手をエスパータイプに変える。
moves.descJa: 相手のタイプをエスパータイプに変える。

moves.name: Magic Room
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, all held items have no effect.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the held items of all active Pokemon have no effect. An item's effect of causing forme changes is unaffected, but any other effects from such items are negated. During the effect, Fling and Natural Gift are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、持ち物の効果を消す。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、場にいるすべてのポケモンの持ち物の効果を無効化する。

moves.name: Magnet Rise
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, the user has immunity to Ground.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will gain the effect. Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball override this move if the user is under any of their effects. Fails if the user is already under this effect or the effects of Ingrain, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、地面技を無効化。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、地面技や設置技を無効にする（浮遊状態になる）。

moves.name: Magnetic Flux
moves.shortDesc: Raises Def, Sp. Def of allies with Plus/Minus by 1.
moves.desc: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of Pokemon on the user's side with the Plus or Minus Abilities by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: プラス・マイナスの味方の防御・特防を1段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 特性「プラス」または「マイナス」を持つ味方の防御・特防ランクを1段階上げる。

moves.name: Matcha Gotcha
moves.shortDesc: 20% burn. Recovers 50% dmg dealt. Thaws foe(s).
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to burn the target. The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. The target thaws out if it is frozen.
moves.shortDescJa: 20%で火傷。与えたダメージの50%回復。
moves.descJa: 20%の確率で「やけど」状態にし、与えたダメージの1/2を回復する。相手が凍っていたら溶かす。

moves.name: Mean Look
moves.shortDesc: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を逃げられなくする。
moves.descJa: 相手を交代できなくする。

moves.name: Mega Kick
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
moves.descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

moves.name: Megahorn
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
moves.descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

moves.name: Memento
moves.shortDesc: Lowers target's Attack, Sp. Atk by 2. User faints.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. The user faints unless this move misses or there is no target. Fails entirely if this move hits a substitute, but does not fail if the target's stats cannot be changed.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻を2段階下げ、自分は倒れる。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを2段階ずつ下げ、自分はひんし状態になる。

moves.name: Metal Burst
moves.shortDesc: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 受けたダメージを1.5倍にして返す。
moves.descJa: このターンに受けたダメージの1.5倍を相手に返す。

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の特防を2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の特防ランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Meteor Beam
moves.shortDesc: Raises user's Sp. Atk by 1 on turn 1. Hits turn 2.
moves.desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 1ターン目に特攻を上げ、2ターン目に攻撃。
moves.descJa: 1ターン目に特攻ランクを1段階上げ、2ターン目に攻撃する。

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 20%で自分の攻撃が1段階上がる。
moves.descJa: 20%の確率で自分の攻撃ランクが1段階上がる。

moves.name: Milk Drink
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: 最大HPの50%回復。
moves.descJa: 最大HPの1/2を回復する。

moves.name: Minimize
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. Whether or not the user's evasiveness was changed, Body Slam, Dragon Rush, Flying Press, Heat Crash, Heavy Slam, Malicious Moonsault, Steamroller, Stomp, and Supercell Slam will not check accuracy and have their damage doubled if used against the user while it is active.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の回避率を2段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の回避率ランクを2段階上げる。

moves.name: Mirror Coat
moves.shortDesc: If hit by special attack, returns double damage.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a special attack this turn equal to twice the HP lost by the user from that attack. If the user did not lose HP from the attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's special attack this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 受けた特殊ダメージを2倍にして返す。
moves.descJa: このターンに受けた特殊技のダメージの2倍を相手に返す。

moves.name: Misty Explosion
moves.shortDesc: User faints. User on Misty Terrain: 1.5x power.
moves.desc: If the current terrain is Misty Terrain and the user is grounded, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: 使用後、自分は倒れる。ミストフィールド時1.5倍。
moves.descJa: 使用後、自分はひんし状態になる。ミストフィールド時は威力が1.5倍になる。

moves.name: Misty Terrain
moves.shortDesc: 5 turns. Can't status,-Dragon power vs grounded.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Misty Terrain. During the effect, the power of Dragon-type attacks used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5 and grounded Pokemon cannot be inflicted with a non-volatile status condition nor confusion. Grounded Pokemon can become affected by Yawn but cannot fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into a Fairy type, Nature Power becomes Moonblast, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower Special Attack by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Misty Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、状態異常を防ぐ。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、足がついているポケモンは状態異常と混乱を防ぎ、ドラゴン技の威力が0.5倍になる。

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 10%で相手の特攻を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 10%の確率で相手の特攻ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Moonlight
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: 天気に応じてHPを回復。
moves.descJa: 天候に応じて最大HPの1/4〜2/3を回復する（デフォルトは1/2）。

moves.name: Morning Sun
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: 天気に応じてHPを回復。
moves.descJa: 天候に応じて最大HPの1/4〜2/3を回復する（デフォルトは1/2）。

moves.name: Mortal Spin
moves.shortDesc: Poisons foes, frees user from hazards/bind/leech.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を毒にし、自分は拘束や設置技を解除。
moves.descJa: 相手を毒状態にする。自分にかかっている拘束、寄生種子、設置技を解除する。

moves.name: Mountain Gale
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%の確率で怯ませる。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で相手を怯ませる。

moves.name: Mud Shot
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Mud-Slap
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の命中率を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の命中率ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Muddy Water
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to lower the foe(s) accuracy by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%で相手の命中率を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で相手の命中率ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の特攻を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の特攻ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Nasty Plot
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の特攻を2段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の特攻ランクを2段階上げる。

moves.name: Night Daze
moves.shortDesc: 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 40%で相手の命中率を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 40%の確率で相手の命中率ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Night Shade
moves.shortDesc: Does damage equal to the user's level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分のレベルと同じダメージを与える。
moves.descJa: 自分のレベルと同じ値のダメージを与える。

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
moves.descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

moves.name: Noble Roar
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを1段階ずつ下げる。

moves.name: Nuzzle
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%の確率で麻痺にする。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手を「まひ」状態にする。

moves.name: Outrage
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
moves.shortDescJa: 2〜3ターン攻撃し、その後混乱。
moves.descJa: 2〜3ターン連続で攻撃し、終了後に自分を混乱状態にする。

moves.name: Overheat
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の特攻を2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の特攻ランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Pain Split
moves.shortDesc: Shares HP of user and target equally.
moves.desc: The user and the target's HP become the average of their current HP, rounded down, but not more than the maximum HP of either one.
moves.shortDescJa: お互いのHPを足して半分にする。
moves.descJa: お互いの残りHPを合計し、平均した値にする。

moves.name: Parabolic Charge
moves.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: 与えたダメージの50%を回復。
moves.descJa: 与えたダメージの1/2のHPを回復する。

moves.name: Parting Shot
moves.shortDesc: Lowers target's Atk, Sp. Atk by 1. User switches.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If this move is successful, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if the target's Attack and Special Attack stat stages were both unchanged, or if there are no unfainted party members.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻を下げ、交代する。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを1段階下げてから交代する。

moves.name: Payback
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target this turn, including actions taken through Instruct or the Dancer Ability. Switching in does not count as an action.
moves.shortDescJa: 後攻なら威力2倍。
moves.descJa: 相手より後に行動すると威力が2倍になる。

moves.name: Perish Song
moves.shortDesc: All active Pokemon will faint in 3 turns.
moves.desc: Each active Pokemon receives a perish count of 4 if it doesn't already have a perish count. At the end of each turn including the turn used, the perish count of all active Pokemon lowers by 1 and Pokemon faint if the number reaches 0. The perish count is removed from Pokemon that switch out. If a Pokemon uses Baton Pass while it has a perish count, the replacement will gain the perish count and continue to count down.
moves.shortDescJa: 3ターン後に全員倒れる。
moves.descJa: 3ターン後に場にいるポケモン全員がひんし状態になる。

moves.name: Petal Blizzard
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。全体攻撃。
moves.descJa: 特に追加効果なし。周囲のポケモン全員を攻撃する。

moves.name: Petal Dance
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
moves.shortDescJa: 2〜3ターン攻撃し、その後混乱。
moves.descJa: 2〜3ターン連続で攻撃し、終了後に自分を混乱状態にする。

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.shortDesc: Disappears turn 1. Hits turn 2. Breaks protection.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 1ターン目に消え、2ターン目に攻撃。守り無効。
moves.descJa: 1ターン目に姿を消し、2ターン目に攻撃する。相手の「まもる」状態を無効化する。

moves.name: Pin Missile
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: 2〜5回連続攻撃。
moves.descJa: 2〜5回連続で攻撃する（スキルリンクなら5回）。

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 10%で相手の攻撃を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 10%の確率で相手の攻撃ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Pluck
moves.shortDesc: User steals and eats the target's Berry.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の木の実を奪って食べる。
moves.descJa: 相手の持っている木の実を奪ってすぐ食べる。

moves.name: Poison Fang
moves.shortDesc: 50% chance to badly poison the target.
moves.desc: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 50%で相手を猛毒にする。
moves.descJa: 50%の確率で相手を「もうどく」状態にする。

moves.name: Poison Jab
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%で相手を毒にする。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で相手を「どく」状態にする。

moves.name: Poison Powder
moves.shortDesc: Poisons the target.
moves.desc: Poisons the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を毒にする。
moves.descJa: 相手を「どく」状態にする。

moves.name: Pollen Puff
moves.shortDesc: If the target is an ally, heals 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: If the target is an ally, this move restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down, instead of dealing damage.
moves.shortDescJa: 味方ならHPを50%回復。
moves.descJa: 対象が味方なら最大HPの1/2を回復させる。

moves.name: Poltergeist
moves.shortDesc: Fails if the target has no held item.
moves.desc: Fails if the target has no held item.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手に持ち物がないと失敗。
moves.descJa: 相手が持ち物を持っていないと失敗する。

moves.name: Population Bomb
moves.shortDesc: Hits 10 times. Each hit can miss.
moves.desc: Hits ten times. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit ten times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move hits four to ten times at random without checking accuracy between hits.
moves.shortDescJa: 最大10回連続攻撃。
moves.descJa: 最大10回連続で攻撃する（スキルリンクなら10回）。

moves.name: Pounce
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Pound
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
moves.descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

moves.name: Power Gem
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
moves.descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

moves.name: Power Shift
moves.shortDesc: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の数値を入れ替える。
moves.descJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の値を入れ替える。

moves.name: Power Split
moves.shortDesc: Averages Attack and Sp. Atk stats with target.
moves.desc: The user and the target have their Attack and Special Attack stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Attack and Special Attack stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分と相手の攻撃・特攻を平均化する。
moves.descJa: 自分と相手の攻撃・特攻の値を合計して2で割った値にする。

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.shortDesc: Swaps Attack and Sp. Atk stat stages with target.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat stage changes with the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分と相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを入れ替える。
moves.descJa: 自分の攻撃・特攻ランク変化を相手と入れ替える。

moves.name: Power Trick
moves.shortDesc: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の数値を入れ替える。
moves.descJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の値を入れ替える。

moves.name: Power Trip
moves.shortDesc: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.
moves.shortDescJa: 能力が上がるごとに威力+20。
moves.descJa: 自分の能力ランクが上がるごとに威力が20ずつ加算される。

moves.name: Power Whip
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
moves.descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

moves.name: Protect
moves.shortDesc: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.
moves.desc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: このターンの相手の技を無効にする。
moves.descJa: このターンの攻撃をすべて無効にする（連続使用で失敗しやすくなる）。

moves.name: Psych Up
moves.shortDesc: Copies the target's current stat stages.
moves.desc: The user copies all of the target's current stat stage changes.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の能力変化をコピーする。
moves.descJa: 相手の能力ランク変化をすべて自分のものにする。

moves.name: Psychic
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 10%で相手の特防を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 10%の確率で相手の特防ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Psychic Fangs
moves.shortDesc: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
moves.desc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.
moves.shortDescJa: 壁を破壊する。
moves.descJa: 攻撃前に相手の場の壁（リフレクター・光の壁・オーロラベール）を破壊する。

moves.name: Psychic Noise
moves.shortDesc: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from healing.
moves.desc: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: 2ターンの間、回復できなくなる。
moves.descJa: 2ターンの間、対象はHPを回復できなくなる。

moves.name: Psychic Terrain
moves.shortDesc: 5 turns. Grounded: +Psychic power, priority-safe.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain. During the effect, the power of Psychic-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot be hit by moves with priority greater than 0, unless the target is an ally. Camouflage transforms the user into a Psychic type, Nature Power becomes Psychic, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Psychic Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、先制技を無効化。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、地面にいるポケモンは先制技を受けなくなり、エスパー技が強化される。

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
moves.descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

moves.name: Psyshield Bash
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で自分の防御が1段階上がる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で自分の防御ランクが1段階上がる。

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.shortDesc: Damages target based on Defense, not Sp. Def.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target based on its Defense instead of Special Defense.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の防御でダメージ計算。
moves.descJa: 相手の防御ステータスを使ってダメージを計算する。

moves.name: Quash
moves.shortDesc: Forces the target to move last this turn.
moves.desc: Causes the target to take its turn after all other Pokemon this turn, no matter the priority of its selected move. Fails if the target already moved this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の行動を最後にする。
moves.descJa: 対象をそのターンの最後に行動させる。

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 先制攻撃を行う。
moves.descJa: 優先度+1の先制技。

moves.name: Quick Guard
moves.shortDesc: Protects allies from priority attacks this turn.
moves.desc: The user and its party members are protected from attacks with original or altered priority greater than 0 made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: 味方への先制技を防ぐ。
moves.descJa: そのターンの間、味方が受ける先制技をすべて防ぐ。

moves.name: Quiver Dance
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 特攻・特防・素早さを1段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の特攻・特防・素早さランクを1段階ずつ上げる。

moves.name: Rage Powder
moves.shortDesc: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
moves.desc: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の技を自分に引き寄せる。
moves.descJa: そのターンの間、相手の単体対象の技をすべて自分に向ける。

moves.name: Raging Bull
moves.shortDesc: Destroys screens. Type depends on user's form.
moves.desc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated. If the user's current form is a Paldean Tauros, this move's type changes to match. Fighting type for Combat Breed, Fire type for Blaze Breed, and Water type for Aqua Breed.
moves.shortDescJa: 壁を破壊し、フォルムでタイプが変わる。
moves.descJa: 攻撃前に壁を破壊する。パルデアケンタロスの場合はフォルムに応じてタイプが変わる。

moves.name: Raging Fury
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
moves.shortDescJa: 2〜3ターン攻撃し、その後混乱。
moves.descJa: 2〜3ターン連続で攻撃し、終了後に自分を混乱状態にする。

moves.name: Rain Dance
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, heavy rain powers Water moves.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Rain Dance. The damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Damp Rock. Fails if the current weather is Rain Dance.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、雨を降らせる。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、天候を「あめ」にする。水技の威力が1.5倍、炎技の威力が0.5倍になる（しめったいわ所持時は8ターン）。

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.shortDesc: Free user from hazards/bind/Leech Seed; +1 Spe.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の拘束や設置技を解除し、素早さ1段階UP。
moves.descJa: 自分にかかっている拘束、寄生種子、設置技を解除し、自分の素早さランクを1段階上げる。

moves.name: Razor Shell
moves.shortDesc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 50%で相手の防御を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 50%の確率で相手の防御ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Recover
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: 最大HPの50%回復。
moves.descJa: 最大HPの1/2を回復する。

moves.name: Recycle
moves.shortDesc: Restores the item the user last used.
moves.desc: The user regains the item it last used. Fails if the user is holding an item, if the user has not held an item, if the item was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by a Pokemon with the Pickup Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be regained.
moves.shortDescJa: 消費した持ち物を拾って再利用する。
moves.descJa: 消費した持ち物を拾って再び持てるようにする。

moves.name: Reflect
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, physical damage to allies is halved.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from physical attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle. Damage is not reduced further with Aurora Veil. Critical hits ignore this effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、物理ダメージを半減。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、味方が受ける物理ダメージを半減する（光の粘土所持時は8ターン）。

moves.name: Reflect Type
moves.shortDesc: User becomes the same type as the target.
moves.desc: Causes the user's types to become the same as the current types of the target. If the target's current types include typeless and a non-added type, typeless is ignored. If the target's current types include typeless and an added type from Forest's Curse or Trick-or-Treat, typeless is copied as the Normal type instead. Fails if the user is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the user is Terastallized, or if the target's current type is typeless alone.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手と同じタイプになる。
moves.descJa: 自分のタイプを相手と同じタイプに変化させる。

moves.name: Rest
moves.shortDesc: User sleeps 2 turns and restores HP and status.
moves.desc: The user falls asleep for the next two turns and restores all of its HP, curing itself of any non-volatile status condition in the process. Fails if the user has full HP, is already asleep, or if another effect is preventing sleep.
moves.shortDescJa: 2ターン眠り、HPと状態異常を全回復。
moves.descJa: 2ターンの間眠り、HPと状態異常をすべて回復する。

moves.name: Reversal
moves.shortDesc: More power the less HP the user has left.
moves.desc: The power of this move is 20 if X is 33 to 48, 40 if X is 17 to 32, 80 if X is 10 to 16, 100 if X is 5 to 9, 150 if X is 2 to 4, and 200 if X is 0 or 1, where X is equal to (user's current HP * 48 / user's maximum HP), rounded down.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の残りHPが少ないほど威力が上がる。
moves.descJa: 自分の残りHPが少ないほど威力が上がる（威力20〜200）。

moves.name: Rising Voltage
moves.shortDesc: 2x power if target is grounded in Electric Terrain.
moves.desc: If the current terrain is Electric Terrain and the target is grounded, this move's power is doubled.
moves.shortDescJa: エレキフィールド時、接地相手に威力2倍。
moves.descJa: エレキフィールドかつ相手が地面にいる場合、威力が2倍になる。

moves.name: Roar
moves.shortDesc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.desc: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を強制的に交代させる。
moves.descJa: 相手を強制的に交代させ、控えのポケモンと入れ替える。

moves.name: Rock Blast
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: 2〜5回連続攻撃。
moves.descJa: 2〜5回連続で攻撃する（スキルリンクなら5回）。

moves.name: Rock Polish
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Speed by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の素早さを2段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の素早さランクを2段階上げる。

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the foe(s) flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%の確率で怯ませる。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で相手を怯ませる。

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Rock Wrecker
moves.shortDesc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.
moves.shortDescJa: 攻撃後、次のターン動けなくなる。
moves.descJa: 攻撃した次のターンは行動不能になる。

moves.name: Role Play
moves.shortDesc: User replaces its Ability with the target's.
moves.desc: The user's Ability changes to match the target's Ability. Fails if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, Zero to Hero, or already matches the target, or if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の特性をコピーする。
moves.descJa: 相手と同じ特性になる。

moves.name: Roost
moves.shortDesc: Heals 50% HP. Flying-type removed 'til turn ends.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user is not Terastallized, until the end of the turn Flying-type users lose their Flying type and pure Flying-type users become Normal type. Does nothing if the user's HP is full.
moves.shortDescJa: HPを50%回復。このターンのみ飛行タイプを失う。
moves.descJa: 最大HPの1/2を回復する。このターンの終了まで飛行タイプを失う（純飛行タイプはノーマルタイプになる）。

moves.name: Round
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if others used Round this turn.
moves.desc: If there are other active Pokemon that chose this move for use this turn, those Pokemon take their turn immediately after the user, in Speed order, and this move's power is 120 for each other user.
moves.shortDescJa: 他の使用者がいると威力UP。
moves.descJa: このターンに他のポケモンが「りんしょう」を使うと、続けて攻撃し威力が120になる。

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.shortDesc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes.
moves.desc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes, including evasiveness.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の能力変化を無視して攻撃。
moves.descJa: 相手の能力ランク変化（回避率含む）を無視してダメージを与える。

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, protects user's party from status.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members cannot have non-volatile status conditions or confusion inflicted on them by other Pokemon. Pokemon on the user's side cannot become affected by Yawn but can fall asleep from its effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Defog. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、状態異常を防ぐ。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、味方は状態異常と混乱にならなくなる。

moves.name: Salt Cure
moves.shortDesc: Deals 1/16 max HP each turn; 1/8 on Steel, Water.
moves.desc: Causes damage to the target equal to 1/16 of its maximum HP (1/8 if the target is Steel or Water type), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.
moves.shortDescJa: 毎ターンHPを削る。鋼・水にはダメージ増。
moves.descJa: 毎ターン終了時に最大HPの1/16のダメージを与える（鋼・水タイプには1/8）。

moves.name: Sand Tomb
moves.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を4〜5ターン拘束し、毎ターン削る。
moves.descJa: 4〜5ターンの間、相手を逃げられなくし、毎ターン最大HPの1/8のダメージを与える（締め付けバンド所持時は1/6）。

moves.name: Sandstorm
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, a sandstorm rages. Rock: 1.5x SpD.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sandstorm. At the end of each turn except the last, all active Pokemon lose 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, unless they are a Ground, Rock, or Steel type, or have the Magic Guard, Overcoat, Sand Force, Sand Rush, or Sand Veil Abilities. During the effect, the Special Defense of Rock-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a special attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Smooth Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sandstorm.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、砂嵐を起こす。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、天候を「すなあらし」にする。岩タイプは特防が1.5倍になる（さらさらいわ所持時は8ターン）。

moves.name: Scald
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. The target thaws out if it is frozen.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%で火傷にする。氷を溶かす。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で「やけど」状態にし、氷状態を解除する。

moves.name: Scale Shot
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times. User: -1 Def, +1 Spe after last hit.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage and raises the user's Speed by 1 stage after the last hit. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: 2〜5回連続攻撃。防御ダウン、素早さUP。
moves.descJa: 2〜5回連続で攻撃し、終了後に自分の防御ランクが1段階下がり、素早さランクが1段階上がる。

moves.name: Scary Face
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の素早さを2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の素早さランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Scorching Sands
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. The target thaws out if it is frozen.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%で火傷にする。氷を溶かす。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で「やけど」状態にし、氷状態を解除する。

moves.name: Screech
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Defense by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の防御を2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の防御ランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
moves.descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

moves.name: Seismic Toss
moves.shortDesc: Does damage equal to the user's level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分のレベルと同じダメージを与える。
moves.descJa: 自分のレベルと同じ値のダメージを与える。

moves.name: Self-Destruct
moves.shortDesc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. The user faints.
moves.desc: The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: 使用後、自分は倒れる。周囲を攻撃。
moves.descJa: 周囲のポケモン全員を攻撃し、自分はひんし状態になる。

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 20%で相手の特防を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 20%の確率で相手の特防ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
moves.descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

moves.name: Shadow Punch
moves.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: 必中。
moves.descJa: 必ず命中する。

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: 先制攻撃を行う。
moves.descJa: 優先度+1の先制技。

moves.name: Shed Tail
moves.shortDesc: User takes 1/2 its max HP to pass a substitute.
moves.desc: The user takes 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, and creates a substitute that has 1/4 of the user's maximum HP, rounded down. The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party and the selected Pokemon has the substitute transferred to it. Fails if the user would faint, or if there are no unfainted party members.
moves.shortDescJa: HPの半分を使い、身代わりを残して交代。
moves.descJa: 最大HPの1/2を消費して身代わりを作り、控えのポケモンと交代する。

moves.name: Sheer Cold
moves.shortDesc: OHKOs non-Ice targets. Fails if user's lower level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + X)%, where X is 30 if the user is an Ice type and 20 otherwise, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Ice-type Pokemon and Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: 一撃必殺。氷タイプ以外に有効。
moves.descJa: 相手を一撃でひんし状態にする。相手のレベルが自分より高いと失敗する。

moves.name: Shell Side Arm
moves.shortDesc: 20% psn. Physical+contact if it would be stronger.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to poison the target. This move becomes a physical attack that makes contact if the value of ((((2 * the user's level / 5 + 2) * 90 * X) / Y) / 50), where X is the user's Attack stat and Y is the target's Defense stat, is greater than the same value where X is the user's Special Attack stat and Y is the target's Special Defense stat. No stat modifiers other than stat stage changes are considered for this purpose. If the two values are equal, this move chooses a damage category at random.
moves.shortDescJa: 20%で毒。状況により物理攻撃になる。
moves.descJa: 20%の確率で毒状態にする。ダメージ効率が良い方（物理か特殊か）で攻撃する。

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.shortDesc: Lowers Def, SpD by 1; raises Atk, SpA, Spe by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. Raises the user's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 防御・特防を下げ、攻撃・特攻・素早さを上げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の防御・特防ランクを1段階ずつ下げ、攻撃・特攻・素早さランクを2段階ずつ上げる。

moves.name: Shelter
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の防御を2段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の防御ランクを2段階上げる。

moves.name: Simple Beam
moves.shortDesc: The target's Ability becomes Simple.
moves.desc: Causes the target's Ability to become Simple. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Simple, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の特性を「たんじゅん」にする。
moves.descJa: 相手の特性を「たんじゅん」に変える。

moves.name: Sing
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を眠らせる。
moves.descJa: 相手を「ねむり」状態にする。

moves.name: Skill Swap
moves.shortDesc: The user and the target trade Abilities.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Ability with the target's Ability. Fails if either the user or the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分と相手の特性を入れ替える。
moves.descJa: 自分と相手の特性を入れ替える。

moves.name: Skitter Smack
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の特攻を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の特攻ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Sky Attack
moves.shortDesc: Charges, then hits turn 2. 30% flinch. High crit.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch and a higher chance for a critical hit. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 1ターン目に溜め、2ターン目に攻撃。
moves.descJa: 1ターン目に力を溜め、2ターン目に攻撃する。30%で怯ませ、急所に当たりやすい。

moves.name: Slack Off
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: 最大HPの50%回復。
moves.descJa: 最大HPの1/2を回復する。

moves.name: Sleep Powder
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を眠らせる。
moves.descJa: 相手を「ねむり」状態にする。

moves.name: Sleep Talk
moves.shortDesc: User must be asleep. Uses another known move.
moves.desc: One of the user's known moves, besides this move, is selected for use at random. Fails if the user is not asleep. The selected move does not have PP deducted from it, and can currently have 0 PP. This move cannot select Assist, Beak Blast, Belch, Bide, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Focus Punch, Hold Hands, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Uproar, Wicked Torque, or any two-turn move.
moves.shortDescJa: 眠っている間、自分の技をランダムで出す。
moves.descJa: 眠っている間に、自分の覚えている技をランダムで1つ出す。

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 30%で相手を毒にする。
moves.descJa: 30%の確率で相手を「どく」状態にする。

moves.name: Sludge Wave
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to poison adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 10%で相手を毒にする。
moves.descJa: 10%の確率で相手を「どく」状態にする。

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.shortDesc: Removes the target's Ground immunity.
moves.desc: This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If this move hits a target under the effect of Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, the effect ends. If the target is a Flying type that has not used Roost this turn or a Pokemon with the Levitate Ability, it loses its immunity to Ground-type attacks and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. During the effect, Magnet Rise fails for the target and Telekinesis fails against the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 飛行状態を解除し、地面技を当てられるようにする。
moves.descJa: 相手を撃ち落とし、飛行状態や「ふゆう」を無効化して地面技が当たるようにする。

moves.name: Smart Strike
moves.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: 必中。
moves.descJa: 必ず命中する。

moves.name: Snap Trap
moves.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を4〜5ターン拘束し、毎ターン削る。
moves.descJa: 4〜5ターンの間、相手を逃げられなくし、毎ターン最大HPの1/8のダメージを与える（締め付けバンド所持時は1/6）。

moves.name: Snarl
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の特攻を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の特攻ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Snore
moves.shortDesc: User must be asleep. 30% chance to flinch target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the user is not asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: 眠っている時のみ使用可。30%で怯ませる。
moves.descJa: 眠っている時にのみ使える。30%の確率で相手を怯ませる。

moves.name: Snowscape
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, snow falls. Ice: 1.5x Def.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. During the effect, the Defense of Ice-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a physical attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Icy Rock. Fails if the current weather is Snow.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、雪を降らせる。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、天候を「ゆき」にする。氷タイプは物理防御が1.5倍になる（つららのいわ所持時は8ターン）。

moves.name: Soak
moves.shortDesc: Changes the target's type to Water.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become a Water type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Water type, or if the target is Terastallized.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を水タイプに変える。
moves.descJa: 相手のタイプを水タイプに変える。

moves.name: Soft-Boiled
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: 最大HPの50%回復。
moves.descJa: 最大HPの1/2を回復する。

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.shortDesc: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
moves.desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.
moves.shortDescJa: 1ターン目に溜め、2ターン目に攻撃。晴れなら即時。
moves.descJa: 1ターン目に力を溜め、2ターン目に攻撃する。晴れ状態なら即時発動する。

moves.name: Solar Blade
moves.shortDesc: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
moves.desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Hail, Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, or Sandstorm and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.
moves.shortDescJa: 1ターン目に溜め、2ターン目に攻撃。晴れなら即時。
moves.descJa: 1ターン目に力を溜め、2ターン目に攻撃する。晴れ状態なら即時発動する。

moves.name: Sparkling Aria
moves.shortDesc: The target is cured of its burn.
moves.desc: If the user has not fainted, the target is cured of its burn.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の火傷を治す。
moves.descJa: 相手の「やけど」状態を治す。

moves.name: Speed Swap
moves.shortDesc: Swaps Speed stat with target.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Speed stat with the target. Stat stage changes are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分と相手の素早さを入れ替える。
moves.descJa: 自分の素早さ実数値を相手と入れ替える。

moves.name: Spicy Extract
moves.shortDesc: Raises target's Atk by 2 and lowers its Def by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers its Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃を2段階上げ、防御を2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃ランクを2段階上げ、防御ランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Spikes
moves.shortDesc: Hurts grounded foes on switch-in. Max 3 layers.
moves.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to three times before failing. Opponents lose 1/8 of their maximum HP with one layer, 1/6 of their maximum HP with two layers, and 1/4 of their maximum HP with three layers, all rounded down. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: 交代してきた相手にダメージ。最大3回。
moves.descJa: 交代してくる相手にダメージを与える罠を設置する。最大3回まで重ねがけ可能。

moves.name: Spiky Shield
moves.shortDesc: Protects from moves. Contact: loses 1/8 max HP.
moves.desc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon making contact with the user lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: 攻撃を防ぎ、接触技なら1/8のダメージ。
moves.descJa: このターンの攻撃を無効化する。接触してきた相手に最大HPの1/8のダメージを与える。

moves.name: Spirit Shackle
moves.shortDesc: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を逃げられなくする。
moves.descJa: 相手を交代できなくする。

moves.name: Spit Up
moves.shortDesc: More power with more uses of Stockpile.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 100 times the user's Stockpile count. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. Whether or not this move is successful, the user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.
moves.shortDescJa: 蓄えた分だけ威力UP。
moves.descJa: 「たくわえる」で蓄えた回数×100の威力を出す。使用後、蓄えはリセットされる。

moves.name: Spite
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the PP of the target's last move by 4.
moves.desc: Causes the target's last move used to lose 4 PP. Fails if the target has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, or if it no longer knows the move.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の最後に使った技のPPを4減らす。
moves.descJa: 相手が最後に使った技のPPを4減らす。

moves.name: Spore
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を眠らせる。
moves.descJa: 相手を「ねむり」状態にする。

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.shortDesc: Hurts foes on switch-in. Factors Rock weakness.
moves.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: 交代してきた相手に岩の弱点に応じたダメージ。
moves.descJa: 交代してくる相手に岩タイプ耐性に応じたダメージを与える罠を設置する。

moves.name: Steel Beam
moves.shortDesc: User loses 50% max HP.
moves.desc: Whether or not this move is successful and even if it would cause fainting, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, unless the user has the Magic Guard Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: 使用後、自分のHPが半分減る。
moves.descJa: 使用後、自分は最大HPの1/2のダメージを受ける。

moves.name: Steel Roller
moves.shortDesc: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the terrain.
moves.desc: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: フィールドがある時のみ有効。解除する。
moves.descJa: フィールドが出ていないと失敗する。出ているフィールドの効果を解除する。

moves.name: Steel Wing
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 10%で自分の防御が1段階上がる。
moves.descJa: 10%の確率で自分の防御ランクが1段階上がる。

moves.name: Sticky Web
moves.shortDesc: Lowers Speed of grounded foes by 1 on switch-in.
moves.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, lowering the Speed by 1 stage of each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: 交代してきた相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 交代してくる相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる罠を設置する。

moves.name: Stockpile
moves.shortDesc: Raises user's Defense, Sp. Def by 1. Max 3 uses.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's Stockpile count increases by 1. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 3. The user's Stockpile count is reset to 0 when it is no longer active.
moves.shortDescJa: 防御と特防を1段階上げる。最大3回まで。
moves.descJa: 自分の防御・特防ランクを1段階ずつ上げ、蓄える回数を増やす（最大3回）。

moves.name: Stomping Tantrum
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.
moves.shortDescJa: 前の技が失敗していたら威力2倍。
moves.descJa: 前のターンに技が失敗していた場合、威力が2倍になる。

moves.name: Stone Axe
moves.shortDesc: Sets Stealth Rock on the target's side.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: 攻撃後、ステルスロックを設置する。
moves.descJa: 攻撃終了後、相手の場に「ステルスロック」を設置する。

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
moves.descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

moves.name: Stored Power
moves.shortDesc: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.
moves.shortDescJa: 能力が上がるごとに威力+20。
moves.descJa: 自分の能力ランクが上がるごとに威力が20ずつ加算される。

moves.name: Storm Throw
moves.shortDesc: Always results in a critical hit.
moves.desc: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.
moves.shortDescJa: 必ず急所に当たる。
moves.descJa: 攻撃は必ず急所に当たる。

moves.name: Strength Sap
moves.shortDesc: User heals HP=target's Atk stat. Lowers Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage. The user restores its HP equal to the target's Attack stat calculated with its stat stage before this move was used. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. Fails if the target's Attack stat stage is -6.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃を下げ、その数値分HPを回復。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃ランクを1段階下げ、下がった攻撃の実数値分、自分のHPを回復する。

moves.name: String Shot
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the foe(s) Speed by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の素早さを2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の素早さランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Struggle
moves.shortDesc: User loses 1/4 of its max HP.
moves.desc: Deals typeless damage to a random opposing Pokemon. If this move was successful, the user loses 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up, and the Rock Head Ability does not prevent this. This move is automatically used if none of the user's known moves can be selected.
moves.shortDescJa: 反動で最大HPの1/4ダメージを受ける。
moves.descJa: タイプなしのダメージを相手に与え、自分は最大HPの1/4のダメージを受ける（特性『いしあたま』でも防げない）。

moves.name: Struggle Bug
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100%で相手の特攻を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 100%の確率で相手の特攻ランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Stuff Cheeks
moves.shortDesc: Fails unless the user has a berry. User eats Berry, Def +2.
moves.desc: Fails if the user is not holding a Berry. The user eats its Berry and raises its Defense by 2 stages. This effect is not prevented by the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room.
moves.shortDescJa: きのみを食べて防御を2段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 持ち物のきのみを食べて、自分の防御ランクを2段階上げる。

moves.name: Stun Spore
moves.shortDesc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.desc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を麻痺させる。
moves.descJa: 相手を「まひ」状態にする。

moves.name: Substitute
moves.shortDesc: User takes 1/4 its max HP to put in a substitute.
moves.desc: The user takes 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, and puts it into a substitute to take its place in battle. The substitute is removed once enough damage is inflicted on it, if the user switches out or faints, or if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up. Baton Pass can be used to transfer the substitute to an ally, and the substitute will keep its remaining HP. Until the substitute is broken, it receives damage from all attacks made by other Pokemon and shields the user from status effects and stat stage changes caused by other Pokemon. Sound-based moves and Pokemon with the Infiltrator Ability ignore substitutes. The user still takes normal damage from weather and status effects while behind its substitute. If the substitute breaks during a multi-hit attack, the user will take damage from any remaining hits. If a substitute is created while the user is trapped by a binding move, the binding effect ends immediately. Fails if the user does not have enough HP remaining to create a substitute without fainting, or if it already has a substitute.
moves.shortDescJa: HPの1/4を使い、身代わりを作る。
moves.descJa: 最大HPの1/4を消費して身代わりを作る。身代わりは本体の代わりにダメージや状態異常を防ぐ。

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first. Fails if target is not attacking.
moves.desc: Fails if the target did not select a physical attack, special attack, or Me First for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.
moves.shortDescJa: 先制攻撃。相手が攻撃技を選んでいないと失敗。
moves.descJa: 優先度+1の先制技。相手が攻撃技を選択していない場合や、先に動いた場合は失敗する。

moves.name: Sunny Day
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, intense sunlight powers Fire moves.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sunny Day. The damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Heat Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sunny Day.
moves.shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、晴れにする。
moves.descJa: 5ターンの間、天候を「ひざしがつよい」にする。炎技の威力が1.5倍、水技の威力が0.5倍になる（あついいわ所持時は8ターン）。

moves.name: Super Fang
moves.shortDesc: Does damage equal to 1/2 target's current HP.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to half of its current HP, rounded down, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の残りHPを半分にする。
moves.descJa: 相手の残りHPの1/2のダメージを与える。

moves.name: Supercell Slam
moves.shortDesc: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
moves.desc: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
moves.shortDescJa: 外すと最大HPの50%の反動ダメージ。
moves.descJa: 技が外れた場合、自分は最大HPの1/2のダメージを受ける。

moves.name: Superpower
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 攻撃と防御が1段階下がる。
moves.descJa: 攻撃と防御ランクを1段階ずつ下げる。

moves.name: Surf
moves.shortDesc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dive.
moves.desc: Damage doubles if the target is using Dive.
moves.shortDescJa: 周囲のポケモンを攻撃。ダイビング相手に2倍。
moves.descJa: 周囲のポケモン全員を攻撃する。相手が「ダイビング」状態ならダメージが2倍になる。

moves.name: Swagger
moves.shortDesc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 and confuses it.
moves.desc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and confuses it.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃を2段階上げ、混乱させる。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃ランクを2段階上げ、混乱状態にする。

moves.name: Swallow
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user based on uses of Stockpile.
moves.desc: The user restores its HP based on its Stockpile count. Restores 1/4 of its maximum HP if it's 1, 1/2 of its maximum HP if it's 2, both rounded half down, and all of its HP if it's 3. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. The user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.
moves.shortDescJa: 蓄えた分に応じてHPを回復。
moves.descJa: 蓄えた回数に応じて最大HPの1/4〜すべてを回復し、蓄えをリセットする。

moves.name: Sweet Kiss
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to become confused.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become confused.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手を混乱させる。
moves.descJa: 相手を混乱状態にする。

moves.name: Sweet Scent
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the foe(s) evasiveness by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の回避率を2段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の回避率ランクを2段階下げる。

moves.name: Switcheroo
moves.shortDesc: User switches its held item with the target's.
moves.desc: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if either the user or the target is holding a Mail or Z-Crystal, if neither is holding an item, if the user is trying to give or take a Mega Stone to or from the species that can Mega Evolve with it, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, a Red Orb, a Griseous Orb, a Plate, a Drive, or a Memory to or from a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, or a Silvally, respectively. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分と相手の持ち物を入れ替える。
moves.descJa: 自分と相手の持ち物を入れ替える。

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Attack by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 自分の攻撃を2段階上げる。
moves.descJa: 自分の攻撃ランクを2段階上げる。

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: 天候に応じてHPを回復。
moves.descJa: 天候に応じて最大HPの1/4〜2/3を回復する。

moves.name: Syrup Bomb
moves.shortDesc: Target's Speed is lowered by 1 stage for 3 turns.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, it causes the target's Speed to be lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn for 3 turns.
moves.shortDescJa: 3ターンの間、毎ターン相手の素早さを下げる。
moves.descJa: 3ターンの間、毎ターン終了時に相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

moves.name: Tail Slap
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: 2〜5回連続攻撃。
moves.descJa: 2〜5回連続で攻撃する（スキルリンクなら5回）。

moves.name: Tailwind
moves.shortDesc: For 4 turns, allies' Speed is doubled.
moves.desc: For 4 turns, the user and its party members have their Speed doubled. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: 4ターンの間、味方の素早さを2倍にする。
moves.descJa: 4ターンの間、味方の素早さを2倍にする。

moves.name: Taunt
moves.shortDesc: Target can't use status moves its next 3 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from using non-damaging moves for its next three turns. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: 3ターンの間、相手の変化技を封じる。
moves.descJa: 3ターンの間、相手は変化技しか使えなくなる。

moves.name: Tearful Look
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃と特攻を1段階下げる。
moves.descJa: 相手の攻撃と特攻ランクを1段階ずつ下げる。

moves.name: Teatime
moves.shortDesc: All active Pokemon consume held Berries.
moves.desc: All active Pokemon consume their held Berries. This effect is not prevented by substitutes, the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if no active Pokemon is holding a Berry.
moves.shortDescJa: 場のポケモン全員がきのみを食べる。
moves.descJa: 場のすべてのポケモンが持っているきのみを食べる。

moves.name: Teeter Dance
moves.shortDesc: Confuses adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become confused.
moves.shortDescJa: 周囲のポケモンを混乱させる。
moves.descJa: 周囲のすべてのポケモンを混乱状態にする。

moves.name: Temper Flare
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.
moves.shortDescJa: 前の技が失敗していたら威力2倍。
moves.descJa: 前のターンに技が失敗していた場合、威力が2倍になる。

moves.name: Terrain Pulse
moves.shortDesc: User on terrain: power doubles, type varies.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user is grounded and a terrain is active, and this move's type changes to match. Electric type during Electric Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: フィールド時、威力2倍かつタイプ変化。
moves.descJa: フィールドに出ている時、威力が2倍になり、対応するタイプに変化する。

moves.name: Thief
moves.shortDesc: If the user has no item, it steals the target's.
moves.desc: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one.
